---
title: "Past Boards"
description: "Previous boards of ISA RC42 Social Psychology."
---

## Past Boards of RC42 Social Psychology

This page will list the composition of previous RC42 boards.

::: {.placeholder-notice}
Information about past RC42 boards is being compiled. If you have served on a previous board or have records of past board compositions, please [contact the current board](../contact/index.qmd).
:::

### Known Past Terms

The following board terms are known to have existed. Details will be added as they are confirmed:

- Board 2018–2023
- Board 2014–2018
- Board 2010–2014
- Earlier terms (since establishment in 1988)

::: {.info-box}
RC42 boards are elected at each ISA World Congress of Sociology, which takes place every four years.
:::
